incidents.title: Database connection timeout on prod-db01
incidents.description: Production database prod-db01 is not accepting connections. Application is down causing full service outage. IP 10.0.1.5 unreachable on TCP port 5432.

incidents.title: Suspicious login attempts from unknown IP
incidents.description: Multiple unauthorized login attempts detected from source IP 185.220.101.42. Brute-force pattern identified on the SSH gateway. Security team alerted.

incidents.title: Checkout service returning NullPointerException
incidents.description: The checkout-service API is throwing a NullPointerException at PaymentProcessor.java:88. Stack trace available in Kibana. HTTP-500 errors spiking. Service is failing.

incidents.title: Network switch offline in DC rack B
incidents.description: Core network switch SW-RACK-B-02 is offline. VLAN 10 and VLAN 20 are unreachable. 40+ servers affected in DC rack B. Production traffic down.

incidents.title: Ransomware signature detected on workstation
incidents.description: EDR tool flagged ransomware signature RANSOM.LOCKBIT on workstation WS-FIN-042 (IP 192.168.50.42). File encryption activity observed. Production data at risk. Emergency response needed.

incidents.title: Payment gateway timeout — Stripe API 503
incidents.description: Payment gateway is receiving HTTP-503 responses from the Stripe API. P99 latency has exceeded 10 seconds. Checkout transactions are failing. Application error code: PAY-TIMEOUT-001.

incidents.title: Intermittent packet loss on VLAN 30
incidents.description: Network monitoring shows intermittent packet loss (8-15%) on VLAN 30 segment 10.2.30.0/24. Protocol UDP streams affected. Performance degraded but not fully down.

incidents.title: Phishing email reported by 3 employees
incidents.description: Three employees in the Finance department reported receiving a phishing email impersonating the CEO. Email contains a malicious link. Credential harvesting suspected. Medium risk — no clicks confirmed yet.

incidents.title: API response slow — P95 latency 4.2s
incidents.description: The user-profile API service is responding slowly. P95 latency has risen to 4.2 seconds (SLA: 500ms). Degraded performance observed for 30 minutes. Root cause under investigation.

incidents.title: Scheduled job failed — non-production env
incidents.description: Nightly ETL batch job failed in the staging environment with error code ETL-EXIT-1. Non-production system. No customer impact. Low priority for remediation.

incidents.title: Minor firewall rule misconfiguration found
incidents.description: Routine security audit found a minor firewall rule permitting unnecessary ICMP traffic from VLAN 99 to DMZ. No active exploitation detected. Low severity vulnerability to be patched in next change window.

incidents.title: DNS resolution intermittent on 10.2.0.0/16
incidents.description: DNS resolution is intermittently failing for hosts on subnet 10.2.0.0/16. Packet captures show UDP DNS queries timing out every 3-4 minutes. Network team investigating the resolver 10.2.0.1.
